title: Repurposed Structures - Jellyfishing Compat
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Jellyfishing. Spawns Krusty Krab buildings in all Overworld RS Villages. Have fun flipping Krabby Patties!

- Jellyfishing mod can be obtained from here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/jellyfishing](https://modrinth.com/mod/jellyfishing)

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/twOK7xRV/images/ad62ca71fc73f89dd558794480752b8efb2b6a70.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/twOK7xRV/images/ad62ca71fc73f89dd558794480752b8efb2b6a70.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
